text:
Reason is the third ending theme of the 2011 anime adaptation of Hunter × Hunter, and is sung by the duo Yuzu. The song was also used as the ending theme for the 2013 movie Phantom Rouge.

On the second week of January 2013, the single ranked at number 3 on the Oricon charts. http://www.comtrya.com/2013/oricon-single-and-album-charts-jan-7th-13th-2013-ryosuke-yamada-and-ayumi-hamasaki-top/
